details.test: Task 1: Save nearest 24/7 pediatric ER that accepts Medicaid to emergency contacts
Task 2: Create emergency family plan for two children and save it
Task 3: Register for earliest free infant CPR class
Task 4: Choose daycare with longest hours and favorite it
Task 5: Subscribe to SMS emergency alerts for ZIP 94110
Task 6: Bookmark free child-friendly evening breastfeeding support group
Task 7: Add three teen mental health hotlines to emergency card
Task 8: Symptom checker and save recommended resource to quick-dial
Task 9: Save two fenced parks with restrooms as meet-up spots
Task 10: Create babysitter info sheet and generate shareable link
